task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number)
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS IAM role with a trust policy allowing EC2 instances to assume it
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS ARN (Amazon Resource Name) formats, such as 'arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket' or 'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/MyRole'
